title: LinkedIn Format Test 2
subhead: Verifying LinkedIn post formatting: BLUF, section headings, and Bottom Line should all display cleanly.

sections.heading: Automation Pipeline Confirmed
sections.whyItMatters: This confirms the RSS-to-LinkedIn pipeline is producing readable, well-structured posts — not raw JSON or compressed blocks.

sections.heading: Next Step: Daily Briefs Go Live
sections.whyItMatters: Once formatting is verified, every daily Strategic Brief will be automatically published to the Frontion News LinkedIn page.

bottomLine: If this post looks good, we are live.
